seoTitle: Fern Hill vs Ferndale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fern Hill and Ferndale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fern Hill vs Ferndale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fern Hill and Ferndale.
heading: Fern Hill vs Ferndale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fern Hill, Victoria and Ferndale, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ferndale has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Fern Hill (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fern Hill or Ferndale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fern Hill has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Ferndale scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fern Hill scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Ferndale scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fern Hill or Ferndale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ferndale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
